name: Rope Park Indoor Grindelwald
description: Discover Rope Park Indoor Grindelwald in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Rope Park Indoor Grindelwald in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Rope park
subcategory.description: Rope parks offer a lot of fun for all those who like to travel at heights and between the trees. Mostly the parks are embedded in a beautiful natural landscape and offer excitement as well as impressive views in equal measure. None of the 50 or so rope parks in Switzerland is exactly like the other, because each one is unique and individually designed.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Indoor rope park Grindelwald: Children experience climbing and adventure in summer.

Indoor Rope Park Grindelwald: Experience adventures for kids and families in an exciting environment.
Indoor Rope Park Grindelwald: Kids experience adventure in an exciting high ropes course.
Indoor Rope Park Grindelwald: Experience adventure with your team and children in the indoor area.
